name: When Does Recurrence Become an Algorithm? Convergence Selection in Weight-Tied Looped Transformers
summary: arXiv:2607.20594v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: When does a weight-tied looped transformer -- one block applied T times -- implement an actual algorithm? We answer with four findings from control...
description: arXiv:2607.20594v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: When does a weight-tied looped transformer -- one block applied T times -- implement an actual algorithm? We answer with four findings from controlled populations on group word problems. (1) The budget law: free training installs a linear computation frontier, a mechanism that solves v positions per loop, whose speed is priced by the training co...
author: Tong Zhang, Junhao Hu, Yun Peng, Tao Xie
